personal_info.name: Abhishek Kumar Pal
personal_info.title: Software Engineer | Flutter Developer
personal_info.bio: I am a Java Software Developer and Full Stack Fresher specializing in building scalable backend services with Spring Boot and cross-platform mobile/web apps with Flutter. Experienced in multithreaded architecture, API optimization, feedback module integration. Here is my some works
personal_info.tagline: Crafting high-performance backends and interactive software experiences

experiences.title: Software Developer
experiences.description: Built and Integrated Sim lifecycle module for IOT devices like GPS Tracker, Dashcams, covering SIM Activation, recharge flows, and user tutorials. Enhanced CRM ticketing system by fixing critical issues in workflows, optimized high-latency backend APIs using java multithreading, improved downtime, significantly improving issue resolution efficiency. Designed and integrated Automation bot, and templates for feedback collections and live chat feature. Integrated Feedback Management Module for support executives, enabling feedback collection via WhatsApp (Wati), mobile app and SMS links, all centrally managed by CRM. Integrated third-party Calling services (Zoho Desk, Servatel) to streamline customer support operations. Developed and optimized flutter Application, fixing performance bottlenecks, and improved app stability.

projects.title: AI-Mailing
projects.description: Built An AI powered email assistants that's generates and replies to email with customizable tones, reducing drafting efforts to 70-90 %. Also integrated as Chrome Extension for Seamless Gmail replies. Implemented JWT-based authentication and authorization to protect user sessions and secure Gmail-related operations. Developed a React-based frontend with a clean, intuitive UI enabling users to paste emails, generate replies, and copy responses seamlessly.
projects.problem: Manual drafting of business and professional emails takes significant time and effort, leading to lower productivity and inconsistent response tones.
projects.solution: Built a Chrome extension and React web application powered by Generative AI that generates customized responses based on email context and tone preferences, backed by a Spring Boot JWT-authenticated service.
projects.result: Reduced email drafting times by 70-90% and secured operations using industry-standard JWT authorization.

projects.title: TextFlix-AI
projects.description: Designed and implemented end to end automated AI pipeline that's converts a single text into videos optimized for Instagram reels, and YouTube shorts. Built a multi-model generative workflow using Gemini for script generation, Pollination AI for image generation, Eleven labs for humanly voiceover, ffmpeg for final video composition with subtitles. Built flutter Application for client-side and integrated SQL lite for persistence storage.
projects.problem: Creating short-form video content manually requires intensive editing, scriptwriting, voiceover recording, and visual generation, which is time-consuming for content creators.
projects.solution: Developed an end-to-end automated pipeline integrating Gemini, Pollination AI, Eleven Labs, and FFMPEG to compile videos from raw text inputs, paired with a Flutter app using SQLite.
projects.result: Fully automated video generation, producing Reels and Shorts directly from text prompts.

projects.title: Bank Management System
projects.description: Built a terminal based Bank management system which can do basic bank operations like balance check, add amount, money transfer to other account, create account
projects.problem: faced difficulty on connecting backend to mysql
projects.solution: Used AIs, youtube videos to understood about jdbc, dependencies

projects.solution: built it by watching youtube tutorial
